title: Ace’s Fate and the End of the War
description: In the Marineford War storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Blackbeard, Unknown person #5, Luffy, Unknown person #8 as the scene develops across pages 1–4.
scene: This scene advances the Marineford War conflict through Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Blackbeard, Unknown person #5, Luffy, focusing on the immediate stakes of ace’s fate and the end of the war.

dialogue.speaker: Blackbeard
dialogue.text: i won't let you take his life!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Take Ace's brother and go, Jimbe!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: his life... is ace's living will!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: we'll protect him in ace's place!!!
